Please include as many of the below details as possible:

Date of event

Location (State, Country)

Division (where applicable)

Incident Classification (RWI, MTI, LTI, Fatality)

For LTI events, how many days were lost

Details of the actual incident including injury type

Learnings/Actions implemented

Your safety statistics have returned a TRIFR above SFPJV’s recommended threshold. As such, can you please provide details in accordance with the following points for each RWI, MTI, LTI and/or fatality that you entered? In most instances, this will be a simple data extraction from your incident management system.
Please upload any documents if applicable.
